items.content:
## Move-purity verification (mechanical facts)
- 145 files are pure renames (R100, byte-identical) under git rename detection (`git diff -M --name-status`)
- package-lock.json regenerated for workspace layout (not hand-edited)
- Only 3 moved files carry edits (R098/R099). COMPLETE edit hunks:
### src/index.ts
```diff
@@ -15,6 +15,14 @@
 
 export {validateOptions} from './options';
 
+/**
+ * Plugin version read from package.json at load time (server-side only).
+ * Threaded to theme components via StatusData.pluginVersion — replaces
+ * the generated src/version.ts (ADR-005 §11).
+ */
+// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-var-requires
+const PLUGIN_VERSION: string = require('../package.json').version;
+
 /**
  * System entry in .monitorrc.json
  */
@@ -419,6 +427,7 @@
           useDemoData: true,
           fetchUrl: options.fetchUrl,
           statusCardLayout: options.statusCardLayout,
+          pluginVersion: PLUGIN_VERSION,
         };
 
@@ -717,6 +726,7 @@
         useDemoData: shouldUseDemoData,
         fetchUrl: options.fetchUrl,
         statusCardLayout: options.statusCardLayout,
+        pluginVersion: PLUGIN_VERSION,
       };
```
### src/types.ts
```diff
@@ -581,6 +581,12 @@ export interface StatusData {
    */
   statusCardLayout?: 'minimal' | 'detailed';
+
+  /**
+   * Plugin version, injected from package.json at load time so theme
+   * components never need a generated version module (ADR-005 §11)
+   */
+  pluginVersion?: string;
 }
```
### src/theme/StatusPage/index.tsx
```diff
@@ -14,7 +14,6 @@
 import type {StatusData, SystemStatusFile, DataSource} from '../../types';
-import {PLUGIN_VERSION} from '../../version';
 import { buildFetchUrl } from '../../data-source-resolver.client';
@@ -35,6 +34,7 @@
     statusCardLayout = 'minimal',
+    pluginVersion,
   } = statusData || {};
@@ -342,7 +342,7 @@
-              Docusaurus Stentorosaur Plugin v{PLUGIN_VERSION}
+              Docusaurus Stentorosaur Plugin{pluginVersion ? ` v${pluginVersion}` : ''}
```
## Deleted files
- scripts/generate-version.js and src/version.ts (the codegen hack this PR removes)
## Gate results
- typecheck clean; 40 suites / 730 tests pass; workspace build emits lib/ + 19 copied CSS files
- New TDD test __tests__/package-layout.test.ts written failing first (pluginVersion + artifact removal + layout smoke)
- Copilot bypassed after 21 min non-engagement (B3); Council is sole reviewer gate

## Reviewer note on target_paths scoping
The three edited-during-move source files (index.ts/types.ts/StatusPage) are EXCLUDED from target_paths because their full content is pre-existing code that merely moved; their complete edit hunks are reproduced above. All other changed files are in target_paths.
